headline: Sun Life Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y, Dividend Raised
summary: SLF's first-quarter results reflect higher premiums, favorable net investment results, higher sales and in-force business growth across the segments.

headline: Everest Appoints Lisa Davis to Lead North America Wholesale & Specialty Business
summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, May 07, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. ("Everest" or "the Company") (NYSE: EG), a global underwriting leader providing world-class reinsurance and specialty insurance solutions, today announced the appointment of Lisa Davis as Head of North America, Wholesale & Specialty.

raw.headline: Everest Appoints Lisa Davis to Lead North America Wholesale & Specialty Business
raw.summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, May 07, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. ("Everest" or "the Company") (NYSE: EG), a global underwriting leader providing world-class reinsurance and specialty insurance solutions, today announced the appointment of Lisa Davis as Head of North America, Wholesale & Specialty.
